description: Curated YouTube video resources for CSS architecture

videos.title: Start over-engineering your CSS | Kevin Powell | CSS Day 2024
videos.creator: Web Conferences Amsterdam
videos.description: Kevin Powell's CSS Day 2024 talk on CSS architecture, embracing complexity for robust solutions, and deepening understanding of CSS at scale.

videos.title: No more specificity issues?! - A look at CSS Cascade Layers
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: CSS Cascade Layers (@layer) as an architectural tool for managing specificity and organizing styles in large projects.

videos.title: Getting started with CSS Nesting
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: CSS Nesting as a tool for cleaner file organization with practical considerations for maintainability and searchability.

videos.title: 23 CSS features you should know (and be using) by now
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Overview of modern CSS features that inform architectural decisions including custom properties, logical properties, and new layout tools.
